title: Easy rank prefixes
description: This project mkes it easy to give a rank prefix to anyone on your minecraft server
body:
This datapack is purely visual and does not edit permissions in game


So this datapack makes it easier to add rank prefixes in minecraft there are a few prefixes I added


there are: Admin, Developer, Member, Player (it was mostly used for debugging), Helper, Moderator, Owner, Builder, Youtuber, Twitch, VIP, VIP+, VIP++, MVP, MVP+, MVP++, Legend, God, Mythic, divine.


In order to give someone a rank use: /tag <playername> add <Rank> 
to remove the rank use: /tag <playername> remove <Rank>


fill in the <Rank> with any of the ranks above you have to type the first letter of the rank uppercase and the rest lowercase or it wont work


run the command: /function ranks:choose_rank_color

all available colors are: red, dark red, blue, dark blue, green, dark green, aqua, dark aqua, yellow, gold (looks like orange), light purple (looks like pink), dark pink, gray, dark gray, 


to open a chat message saying "[click to Choose rank colors]" 
once clicked you will get a menu with all the ranks and all the available colors click on the color you want, for each rank the default colors are:


Player: gray   
Member: gray   
Owner: gold   
Developer: aqua   
Builder: green   
Youtuber: red   
Twitch: dark purple    
VIP: yellow    
VIP+: yellow   
VIP++: yellow   
MVP: aqua   
MVP+: aqua   
MVP++: aqua   
Legend: dark red   
Mythic: dark aqua   
God: gold   
Divine: light purple (pink)


The default Rank that anyone that joins 
  Will recieve is Member there is currently
 No way to change the default rank

to reset all ranks to the default colors use: /function ranks:set_rank_colors_to_default
  
this took me HOURS to code and 
 Wouldn't work as intended so i 
 Always had to change plans i hope this
Datapack is usefull for anyone 
Thank you for supporting me :)
